Lovänya · internal tool

Lovänya — Judgment Review & Taste Trainer

Every outfit, side by side: what Claude said (the answer key), what Qwen 8B said (the model you'll ship), and where they disagree. Add your verdict on each — that's the human taste this dataset is missing. Export it when you're done and drop it into data/ratings.jsonl.

How this data was made (read me first)

Claude gold (120): written offline by Claude against the styling framework — the high-quality target the model is trying to match. It's an AI's taste, not yours. That's the gap you're here to fill.

Qwen 8B (7): Qwen3-VL-8B, 4-bit, actually looking at the photo. This is the model that would run in the app. It is not fine-tuned — it's the stock model steered by the framework text. "Training" hasn't happened yet.

Qwen 3B & Fine-tuned: empty slots. The 3B was never run, and no fine-tune exists yet. Generate both on the RTX 4060 Ti later and re-run build_review.py — these columns fill in automatically.

Your verdicts collect toward the ~300 examples needed before the QLoRA fine-tune. Thumbs are a fast signal; a written verdict becomes a training example in its own right.
